blended.narrative: Magic Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
